app.name: VANTAGE
app.title: VANTAGE — Cybersecurity Platform
app.stale_cache_notice: External APIs are currently unavailable. Showing a previously stored result — may not reflect the current state of this indicator.

login.subtitle: Security Operations Center
login.error_locked: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again after {{until}} or contact your administrator.

forgot_password.title: Recover Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your registered email. If an account is linked, we will send you a reset link.
forgot_password.sent_notice: If an account with this email exists, you will receive a link shortly.
forgot_password.error_generic: Error requesting reset. Please try again.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Create a new password for your account.
reset_password.success_subtitle: Your password has been changed successfully. Log in with your new password.
reset_password.err_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
reset_password.err_invalid_token: The reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset_password.err_used_token: This link has already been used. Please request a new one.
reset_password.err_reuse: This password was recently used. Please choose a different one.
reset_password.err_generic: Error resetting password. Please try again.

auth.session_expired: Your session has expired due to inactivity. Please log in again.
auth.password_expiry_warning: Your password expires in {{days}} day(s). Please update it.
auth.force_reset_notice: You must change your password before continuing.
auth.password_expired_notice: Your password has expired. Please change it to continue.

hunting.page_description: Investigate usernames, aliases, emails, and accounts in a surface separate from infrastructure recon.
hunting.hero_title: Hunting for people, accounts, and digital identities
hunting.hero_body: Orchestrate premium providers focused on profiles, aliases, and digital presence without polluting the Recon Engine.
hunting.supported_tip: Usernames, aliases, and accounts already have an initial provider; email returns explicit MVP feedback.
hunting.results_subtitle_idle: Run a query to review results by provider and consulted artifact.
hunting.results_empty_state: No query has been executed yet in this premium session.
hunting.no_matches: No matches were returned by this provider for the current query.
hunting.providers_unavailable: Unable to load premium hunting providers.

feed.page_description: Track the latest threats collected from RSS, MISP, and other integrations.
feed.empty_preview: No threats collected yet. Configure intelligence sources in Settings.
feed.no_items: No items found with the selected filters.

recon.title: Recon Engine
recon.subtitle: Active and passive reconnaissance — local tools, no external APIs.
recon.empty_state: Enter a target and select modules to start reconnaissance.
recon.error_generic: Failed to start scan. Check the target and try again.
recon.surface_empty: Run at least two modules to generate the attack surface correlation.

search.placeholder: Enter an IP, domain or Hash
search.batch_placeholder: {{count}} targets — press Enter to run batch analysis
search.batch_tip: Separate with comma or semicolon · Enter to analyze

errors.estimate_failed: Failed to estimate impact. Please try again.
errors.submit_failed: Failed to submit batch. Please try again.
errors.sse_lost: Connection lost. Some results may be incomplete.

batch.import_error: Failed to read file. Check the format (.txt or .csv).
batch.import_limit: Limit of {{max}} targets reached. {{skipped}} line(s) skipped.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account management, access, and global integrations.
settings.name: Name
settings.deny_self: Action Denied: You cannot suspend yourself while logged in.
settings.confirm_suspend: Are you sure you want to Suspend access for user '{{user}}'?
settings.confirm_activate: Are you sure you want to Activate access for user '{{user}}'?
settings.err_action: Error performing action on this user
settings.confirm_unlock: Do you want to unlock user '{{user}}'?
settings.deny_self_title: You cannot suspend your own account
settings.force_reset: Force password reset on next login
settings.force_reset_tip: The user will be required to change their password before accessing any feature.
settings.policy_subtitle: Global rules applied when creating or changing passwords.
settings.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to PERMANENTLY DELETE user '{{user}}'? This action cannot be undone.
settings.confirm_revoke_mfa: Are you sure you want to revoke MFA for '{{user}}'? They will need to re-enroll a new authenticator.
settings.import_export_sub: Bulk-import users via CSV or export the full list (without sensitive data).
settings.import_format_hint: Columns: username, name, role, email, preferred_lang
settings.lockout_subtitle: Rules applied to lock accounts after failed attempts.
settings.lockout_max_hint: Number of failed attempts before lockout.
settings.lockout_minutes_hint: Duration (in minutes) the account will be locked.
settings.allowed_ips_hint: One IP or CIDR per line. Leave empty to allow any IP.
settings.mask_pii_desc: Hides emails and sensitive data in exported audit logs.
settings.recon_all_analysts: Scans from all analysts in the last 7 days.
settings.recon_no_jobs: No scans found in this period.
settings.recon_click_hint: Click to open in Recon Engine
settings.design_system_subtitle: Visual foundation, tokens, and primitives currently available for the product.
settings.design_system_intro_body: This screen formalizes the first milestone of the VANTAGE design system: dark surfaces, risk semantics, and shared UI ready for reuse.
settings.design_system_tokens_body: These tokens define canvas, shell, panels, contrast, and severity readability.
settings.design_system_primitives_body: Buttons, badges, panels, and fields should start from this layer before any domain-specific UI.
settings.design_system_usage_body: Use this checklist before expanding the VANTAGE interface.
settings.design_system_input_hint: New fields and forms should start from standardized tokens and states.
settings.design_system_panel_body: Use panels to group context, primary action, and status reading without fragmenting the visual hierarchy.
settings.design_system_rule_tokens_body: If the problem is color, spacing, radius, or contrast, solve it in the foundation before styling one-off cases.
settings.design_system_rule_shared_body: If the same block appears in two product areas, it should leave the domain layer and become a system primitive.
settings.design_system_rule_states_title: States are part of the component
settings.design_system_rule_states_body: Every new visual piece must account for focus, hover, disabled, loading, error, and empty states when applicable.
settings.design_system_rule_views_body: New pages should combine shell, panels, badges, and buttons from the foundation before creating parallel styles.
settings.smtp_subtitle: Configure notification delivery and validate sending without relying on shell access to the server.
settings.smtp_form_body: Fields persisted in the control plane, with visible source tracking and secrets always masked.
settings.smtp_state_body: Shows the value currently in effect and whether it came from default, env or admin persistence.
settings.smtp_test_body: Use a controlled send to validate host, authentication and sender before trusting automatic notifications.
settings.smtp_host_hint: Hostname or IP of the relay/mail server.
settings.smtp_password_hint: Leave blank to keep the currently persisted secret.
settings.smtp_from_hint: Address shown as the source of outgoing mail.
settings.smtp_tls_hint: Enable when the relay requires secure delivery.
settings.smtp_test_target_hint: Optional. If empty, the backend will try to use the logged-in admin email.
settings.smtp_test_target_body: Useful for validating real flows without triggering production notifications.
settings.smtp_disable_confirm: Do you want to disable runtime SMTP now?
settings.operational_status_subtitle: Health and consumption snapshot for VANTAGE core services.
settings.operational_status_snapshot_body: A collector can fail without taking the whole panel down. This helps distinguish partial degradation from total outage.
settings.threat_ingestion_subtitle: Read-only view of external intelligence sources, synchronization status and ingestion volume.
settings.threat_ingestion_load_error: Failed to load threat ingestion sources.
settings.threat_ingestion_snapshot_body: This panel reads the catalog, current config and last sync state without exposing secrets.
settings.threat_ingestion_snapshot_hint: Secrets remain masked even when a source is configured with credentials.
settings.extensions_catalog_subtitle: Read-only view of detected extensions, core compatibility, and manifest errors.
settings.extensions_catalog_snapshot_body: This panel exposes metadata, compatibility, and registry errors without persisted activation.
settings.extensions_catalog_empty_body: The registry did not find valid manifests in this environment right now.
settings.extensions_catalog_filtered_empty_body: The selected tier has no detected extensions in this environment.

audit.my_history_sub: Your last accesses and actions on the platform (last 20 events).

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your preferences, password, and display photo.
profile.recovery_email_sub: Used to send password reset links. Leave blank to use the account primary email.
profile.lang_sub: Sets the default language for intelligence module inferences.
profile.security_sub: Leave blank if you don't wish to change your password.
profile.err_img_invalid: Please select a valid image file.
profile.err_pass_len: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
profile.err_policy_min: Password must be at least {{min}} characters long.
profile.err_policy_upper: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
profile.err_policy_number: Password must contain at least one number.
profile.err_policy_symbol: Password must contain at least one special character.
profile.err_pass_history: This password was recently used. Please choose a different one.
profile.restart_tour_sub: Review the interactive walkthrough of the platform features.

virustotal.title: VirusTotal
virustotal.desc: Scans files and URLs with 70+ antivirus engines and security tools.

abuseipdb.title: AbuseIPDB
abuseipdb.desc: Community-driven database of abusive IPs reported by security professionals.

alienvault.title: AlienVault OTX
alienvault.desc: Collaborative threat intelligence platform with community-submitted threat pulses.

shodan.title: Shodan
shodan.desc: Search engine for internet-connected devices, exposing open ports and vulnerabilities.

greynoise.title: GreyNoise
greynoise.desc: Filters internet noise by identifying automated scanners and known attackers.

urlscan.title: URLScan.io
urlscan.desc: Analyzes and screenshots web pages, identifying malicious behavior and loaded resources.

blacklistmaster.title: BlacklistMaster
blacklistmaster.desc: Checks if an IP appears on spam, abuse, and malware blocklists.

abusech.title: Abuse.ch (ThreatFox)
abusech.desc: Malicious IOC database maintained by abuse.ch, focused on active malware.

pulsedive.title: Pulsedive
pulsedive.desc: Threat intelligence platform with risk scoring based on multiple threat feeds.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please reload the page.

tour.onboarding_title: Do you want to configure your API keys now?
tour.onboarding_desc: You can connect your personal intelligence keys before the guided tour. If you prefer, we can continue straight to the product walkthrough.
tour.search_desc: Search IPs, domains or hashes to query multiple intelligence sources simultaneously.
tour.lang_desc: Choose the language for generated reports. We support Portuguese, English and Spanish.
tour.sidebar_desc: Use the side menu to navigate between the application screens.
tour.home_desc: This is the main landing surface, with the central search, shortcuts and intelligence preview.
tour.feed_desc: Open the dedicated news and intelligence page populated by RSS, CVE and MISP ingestion.
tour.profile_desc: Access your profile to change password, default language and photo.
tour.recon_desc: Run technical hunting and review reconnaissance history for domains, IPs and hosts.
tour.watchlist_desc: Monitor priority assets and receive alerts when relevant results change.
tour.dashboard_desc: SOC metrics, search history and real-time threat trends.
tour.settings_desc: Manage user accounts, access profiles and integrations.

mfa.section_sub: Secure your account with a code generated by your authenticator app.
mfa.confirm_disable: Are you sure you want to disable MFA?
mfa.mandatory_notice: MFA is mandatory for your role and cannot be disabled.
mfa.mandatory_warning: Your role requires MFA. Please enable it to continue using the platform.
mfa.scan_instruction: Scan the QR Code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
mfa.backup_codes_notice: Store these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
mfa.enter_otp_label: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator:
mfa.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
mfa.error_mandatory: MFA is mandatory for your role.
mfa.verify_subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
mfa.setup_required_notice: Your role requires MFA. Please set it up to ensure continued access.
mfa.backup_subtitle: Enter one of your backup codes (format XXXXXX-XXXXXX).

sessions.subtitle: Devices and browsers with an open session on your account.
sessions.confirm_revoke: Are you sure you want to end this session?
sessions.confirm_revoke_others: Are you sure you want to end all other active sessions?

api_keys.subtitle: Generate keys to integrate external systems. The key is shown only once at creation.
api_keys.copy_notice: Copy and save this key now — it will not be shown again.
api_keys.confirm_revoke: Are you sure you want to revoke the key '{{name}}'? This action cannot be undone.

third_party_keys.subtitle: Configure your personal API keys for threat intelligence services.
third_party_keys.description: Your personal keys take priority over the system's global keys. Keys are stored with AES-256 encryption.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.subtitle: Monitor specific targets and get alerts when their verdict changes.

permissions.section_sub: Grant specific access beyond the role's default permissions.
permissions.audit_logs_read_desc: Allows access to the full audit log.
permissions.users_export_desc: Allows exporting the user list as CSV/JSON.
permissions.apikeys_manage_desc: Allows creating and revoking own API keys.
